mapper.sql: id, name, value, currency, pipeline_id, stage_id, company_id, expected_close_date, closed_at, created_at, updated_at
d.id, d.name, d.value, d.currency, d.pipeline_id, d.stage_id, d.company_id, d.expected_close_date, d.closed_at, d.created_at, d.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM deal d JOIN deal_person dp ON dp.deal_id = d.id WHERE dp.person_id = #{personId}
SELECT FROM deal d JOIN deal_tag dt ON dt.deal_id = d.id WHERE dt.tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE deal SET name = #{name}, value = #{value}, currency = #{currency}, pipeline_id = #{pipeline.id}, stage_id = #{stage.id}, company_id =
#{company.id} NULL , expected_close_date = #{expectedCloseDate}, closed_at = #{closedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO deal_tag (deal_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{dealId}, #{tagId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM deal_tag WHERE deal_id = #{dealId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO deal_person (deal_id, person_id) VALUES (#{dealId}, #{personId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM deal_person WHERE deal_id = #{dealId} AND person_id = #{personId}
